top_signals.title: Shipbuilding Contract Awarded for Missile Range Instrumentation Vessels
top_signals.summary: Hanwha Philly Shipyard (HPSI) and TOTE Services were selected to deliver the Missile Defense Agency’s (MDA) Missile Range Instrumentation Vessels (MRIV). TOTE Services will serve as vessel construction manager (VCM), and HPSI will build the…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Citi Says Magnificent Seven Tag Is Obsolete in AI Stock Winners
top_signals.summary: The popular Magnificent Seven stocks moniker is “no longer relevant” in assessing how to play the US artificial intelligence trade, according to Citigroup Inc. strategists.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Guidance: Royal Mint Trading Fund: framework document
top_signals.summary: This document sets out the accountabilities and relationships between the Royal Mint Trading Fund, the Shareholder (HM Treasury) and the Shareholder Representative (UK Government Investments).
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Japanese logistics firm turns to JPYC stablecoin to fight labor shortages: report
top_signals.summary: By offering contractors faster payments with stablecoins, the firm seeks to attract more business partners, according to Nikkei.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Senator calls on Rubio, Blanche to push back against Canadian surveillance legislation
top_signals.summary: Democratic Sen. Ron Wyden says the Trump administration should pressure Canada not to enact a proposal that would "weaponize American technology infrastructure" for surveillance purposes.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Nara cafe owner hopeful about ancient capitals’ World Heritage listing
top_signals.summary: The UNESCO World Heritage Committee' is deliberating in Busan, South Korea, whether to add the Asuka-Fujiwara ancient capitals to its list of World Heritage sites.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: World Cup audience stayed bipartisan despite Trump's prominent role, CNBC survey finds
top_signals.summary: Nearly half of registered voters watched the 2026 World Cup, with income and education shaping viewership more than party affiliation, the survey found.
